members.name: timecode
members.description: Get a Timecode object for the timecode data representation of the last sent index. See Timecode Class.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Send an auxiliary message. The message must be serializable. The message will come through the `onReceive` callback of the Sync In CHOP. *message - A serializable message.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the SyncoutCHOP Class wiki page
